text:
There was an old tree. Birds built their nests there. A rabbit liked to hop. One day, the squirrel climbed into the nest. A owl looked down. "Oh," thought the owl. "You're sleepy." Owl hooted softly.

A fox stalked silently. "Ooh," thought the fox. "That squirrel smells good." He went closer. But then the owl hooted again. The fox jumped.

A mouse squeaked. That woke the owl. The owl flew owl ow OH!

The fox flew too late. He fell.

Everywhere else was silent again.

That’s the end.<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|>
